══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Satyr — Iron Concentration (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Satyr — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Satyr — Iron Concentration. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Satyr — Iron Concentration.
→ Satyr — Iron Concentration: CON save [d20:15+8=23 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 12 necrotic damage (half).
--- Satyr — Iron Concentration --- HP: 55/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:13+9=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
